name: Car Detailing Master
author: Poki
description: Car Detailing Master is a satisfying and creative color game where you become the ultimate car makeover artist! Carefully remove the wheels, choose your favorite colors, paint with precision, and polish each car to perfection. Customize all kinds of rides in a super realistic and fun way. Ready to shine up your dream car? How to play Car Detailing Master? Left click and hold to remove the wheels, paint, and shine Move: WASD or the arrow keys E: shine Who created Car Detailing Master? Car Detailing Master is created by Gamebole Studios. Play their other games on Poki: Pool Merge Io ! How can I play Car Detailing Master for free? You can play Car Detailing Master for free on Poki. Can I play Car Detailing Master on mobile devices and desktop? Car Detailing Master can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
